description:
Control a Windows PC over the network or serial port.

MCE Controller lets you control a Windows PC — Windows Media Center and beyond — over
the network (TCP/IP) or a serial port. It runs as a server that receives text commands
and turns them into keystrokes, mouse actions, launched programs, window activations,
and power/shutdown actions, with a configurable command set.
What's Changed
- Add get-text observation tool for region OCR (#331) by @tig in #334
- Add built-in ctrl-a/c/v/z/s send_command chord shortcuts by @tig with @Copilot in #338
- capture: add path-only output and optional still-image downscale by @tig with @Copilot in #336
- Add Grok Build MCP registration instructions to handoff and docs by @tig in #341
- Expose enabled vs gated commands at connect time (#324) by @tig in #340
- launch: report explicit new-process vs attached-existing disposition by @tig with @Copilot in #337
- click/drag: support window-client-relative pixel endpoints when window target is set by @tig with @Copilot in #335
- Add diagnostic logging for DisableUpdatePopup (#312) by @tig in #342
Full Changelog: v3.0.27...v3.0.28
